---
title: "NYC Real Estate Data Analysis Project"
subtitle: "Analyzing East New York real estate data to identify trends and insights"
format:
  html:
    theme: cosmo
    toc: true
    toc-depth: 3
    smooth-scroll: true
    page-layout: full
---

<iframe src="visuals/AD571_FinalPresentation.pdf" width="100%" height="600px"></iframe>
<iframe src="visuals/MET+AD+571+Assignment+#2_EsshaKhan (6).pdf" width="100%" height="600px"></iframe>
